title: piptatherum virescens
intro: Piptatherum virescens, also known as Green Millet Grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Piptatherum virescens include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and promoting digestion. Herbal preparations of Piptatherum virescens include teas and infusions, which can be made by steeping the dried plant in hot water.
